mapper.insert: insert into task_assignments() values(#{assignment.assignmentId},#{assignment.taskId},#{assignment.incidentId},#{assignment.agentId},#{assignment.agentType},#{assignment.ownerGatewayNodeId},#{assignment.agentSessionId},#{assignment.siteId},#{assignment.eventStage},#{assignment.originSourceSystem},#{assignment.targetSystem},#{assignment.requestedSkill},#{assignment.correlationId},#{assignment.parentTaskId},#{assignment.handoffMode},#{assignment.matchedFlowId},#{assignment.matchedRuleId},#{assignment.assignedPoolId},#{assignment.targetPoolId},#{assignment.routingPath},#{assignment.status},#{assignment.routingPolicy},#{assignment.routingDecisionId},#{assignment.dispatchAttemptId},#{assignment.leaseId},#{assignment.fencingToken},#{assignment.leaseExpiresAt},#{assignment.score},#{assignment.reason},#{assignment.capacityReserved},#{assignment.capacityReservedAt},#{assignment.capacityReleasedAt},#{assignment.createdAt},#{assignment.updatedAt}) on conflict(assignment_id) do update set agent_id=excluded.agent_id,agent_type=excluded.agent_type,owner_gateway_node_id=excluded.owner_gateway_node_id,agent_session_id=excluded.agent_session_id,site_id=excluded.site_id,event_stage=excluded.event_stage,origin_source_system=excluded.origin_source_system,target_system=excluded.target_system,requested_skill=excluded.requested_skill,correlation_id=excluded.correlation_id,parent_task_id=excluded.parent_task_id,handoff_mode=excluded.handoff_mode,matched_flow_id=excluded.matched_flow_id,matched_rule_id=excluded.matched_rule_id,assigned_pool_id=excluded.assigned_pool_id,target_pool_id=excluded.target_pool_id,routing_path=excluded.routing_path,status=excluded.status,routing_policy=excluded.routing_policy,routing_decision_id=excluded.routing_decision_id,dispatch_attempt_id=excluded.dispatch_attempt_id,lease_id=excluded.lease_id,fencing_token=excluded.fencing_token,lease_expires_at=excluded.lease_expires_at,score=excluded.score,reason=excluded.reason,capacity_reserved=excluded.capacity_reserved,capacity_reserved_at=excluded.capacity_reserved_at,capacity_released_at=excluded.capacity_released_at,updated_at=excluded.updated_at
mapper.select: select from task_assignments where task_id=#{taskId} and status in('ASSIGNED','AWAITING_REVIEW') order by created_at desc limit 1
mapper.update: update task_assignments set capacity_reserved=false,capacity_released_at=#{releasedAt},updated_at=#{releasedAt} where assignment_id=#{assignmentId} and capacity_reserved=true
mapper.select: select from task_assignments where task_id=#{taskId} order by created_at desc limit #{limit}
select from task_assignments order by created_at desc limit #{limit}
